subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto Thee, O my God, inasmuch as Thou hast created me, manifested me, given me to drink, sustained me, nurtured me, and caused me to know Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما خلقتنی و اظهرتنی و سقیتنی و اطعمتنی و ربیتنی و عرفتنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
